ddls:
CREATE TABLE "taxpayers" (
  "taxpayer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxpayer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the taxpayer (corporation or parent entity) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of taxpayer (e.g., Corporation, Partnership) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the taxpayer is registered */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the taxpayer operates */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Unique tax identification number */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the taxpayer was registered */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxpayer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "taxpayer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxpayer involved in the transaction */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent entity involved in the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Monetary value of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, purchase, service) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the transaction was conducted */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for conversion to the reporting currency */,
  "tax_code" TEXT /* Tax code applicable to the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Amount of tax applicable to the transaction */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the transaction */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the transaction */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES taxpayers ("taxpayer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_taxpayer_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxpayer_id") REFERENCES taxpayers ("taxpayer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment */,
  "taxpayer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxpayer making the adjustment */,
  "year" TEXT /* Tax year for which the adjustment is made */,
  "adjustment_type" TEXT /* Type of adjustment (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Monetary value of the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date when the adjustment was recorded */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment */,
  "document_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document supporting the adjustment */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* User who approved the adjustment */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the adjustment was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_adjustments_document_id FOREIGN KEY ("document_id") REFERENCES compliance_documents ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_adjustments_taxpayer_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxpayer_id") REFERENCES taxpayers ("taxpayer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "taxpayer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxpayer associated with the document */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., Transfer Pricing Report, Tax Return) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the document file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was uploaded */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, final, archived) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the document */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the document */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_documents_taxpayer_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxpayer_id") REFERENCES taxpayers ("taxpayer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tax_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tax year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the tax year (e.g., 2023) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tax year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tax year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tax year */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tax year (e.g., open, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tax manager, accountant, auditor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Unique employee identifier */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the role assignment expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
